retry_reason: If the refcount hits zero, the object is freed; retrying would be a use-after-free. If the refcount is not zero, the function does nothing further — no failure condition to retry.
contract_summary: Put wrapper: releases a reference on an extent_map by decrementing its refcount via refcount_dec_and_test. If the refcount drops to zero, asserts that the extent_map is not in a tree or list, then frees the object via kmem_cache_free. The caller must not use the extent_map after calling this function, as it may have been freed. This function represents the release side of the reference-count lifecycle; it must be paired one-to-one with a prior get (acquisition) of a reference.
